regime_fall.current_status: Active military escalation with US-Israeli strikes on Iranian infrastructure occurring simultaneously with diplomatic signaling including a 5-day bombing pause and 15-point peace proposal, while Iran's new leadership under Mojtaba Khamenei confronts severe internal fractures between hardline IRGC control and civilian government, unprecedented economic collapse, and the most severe civil unrest in Islamic Republic history.
regime_fall.last_major_event: US-Israeli forces conducted wide-scale strikes including attacks on B1 bridge near Karaj and massive explosion in Jack neighborhood of Tehran on April 3, while Trump announced 'productive' talks with Iran and postponed strikes on energy infrastructure for five days, creating a paradox of simultaneous military escalation and diplomatic engagement.
